  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:

  Log:
  Mixlib::Log provides a mixin for enabling a class based logger object, a-la
  Merb, Chef, and Nanite.
  
  WWW: http://github.com/opscode/mixlib-log
  
  PR:             ports/145846
  Submitted by:   renchap at cocoa-x.com
